lines.name: Voices
lines.flavourText: Only a madman would ignore a god's instructions.

explicitModifiers.text: Allocates (2-4) [SinisterJewelSockets|Sinister] [Jewel] sockets

lines.name: Grand Spectrum
lines.flavourText: Skin like steel tempered by bright flames.

explicitModifiers.text: +(6-7)% to all [Resistances|Elemental Resistances] per socketed Grand Spectrum

lines.name: The Adorned
lines.flavourText:
At their height, the Vaal glittered under the sun.
A decade, a century, an aeon of prosperity...
now nothing more than a passing wonder.

lines.name: Against the Darkness
lines.flavourText: After the fires, in the depths of the Winter of the World, all life in the Vastiri banded together. Whether serpent, hyena, human, or golem, hated enemies clasped hand to claw, built refuge, and fought side by side against the Abyssals. Thus, the Third Pact was born.

lines.name: Controlled Metamorphosis
lines.flavourText:
Our world was dying, but we chose to survive.
We broke free from the chains within.

lines.name: Heroic Tragedy
lines.flavourText:
They believed themselves courageous and selfless,
but that bravery became the doom at their door.

lines.name: Undying Hate
lines.flavourText:
They believed themselves driven by necessity,
but that desperation made them monstrous.

lines.name: Heart of the Well
lines.flavourText:
Countless souls scream in agonising harmony,
forever sinking under the weight of the newly dead.

lines.name: Flesh Crucible
lines.flavourText:
"Never mind the pain, it's only... making room. Unrelated fact,
a person can live a normal life with just one kidney. Or just one
lung. You never know what Vaal technology will cost you..."

lines.name: Megalomaniac
lines.flavourText:
If you're going to act like you're better
than everyone else, make sure you are.

lines.name: From Nothing
lines.flavourText:
They clawed their way up from the agonising depths of nonexistence,
breathing deep with joy the exquisite light of meaning.
